    • hasBrackets

      private static boolean hasBrackets(Formula<?> formula, String string)
      Tells whether the given sub-formula occurs surrounded by brackets in the given string. The source location of the given sub-formula must originate from the given string.
      Parameters:
      formula - a sub-formula
      string - a string where the given sub-formula has been parsed from
      Returns:
      true iff the given sub-formula is surrounded by brackets
